'''ân-ng-s''' ('''kanangas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ribodeplete|ribodeplete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ribodeplete|ribodeplete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-ng-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanangas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinangas|thinangas]] || [[word:jinangas|jinangas]] || [[word:shinangas|shinangas]] || [[word:kinangas|kinangas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunangas|thuthunangas]] || [[word:jujunangas|jujunangas]] || [[word:shushunangas|shushunangas]] || [[word:kukunangas|kukunangas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunangas|thunangas]] || [[word:junangas|junangas]] || [[word:shunangas|shunangas]] || [[word:kunangas|kunangas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunangas|thunangas]] || [[word:junangas|junangas]] || [[word:shunangas|shunangas]] || [[word:kunangas|kunangas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenangas|thenangas]] || [[word:jenangas|jenangas]] || [[word:shenangas|shenangas]] || [[word:kenangas|kenangas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonangas|thothonangas]] || [[word:jojonangas|jojonangas]] || [[word:shoshonangas|shoshonangas]] || [[word:kokonangas|kokonangas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonangas|thonangas]] || [[word:jonangas|jonangas]] || [[word:shonangas|shonangas]] || [[word:konangas|konangas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonangas|thonangas]] || [[word:jonangas|jonangas]] || [[word:shonangas|shonangas]] || [[word:konangas|konangas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnangas|thĂŠnangas]] || [[word:jĂŠnangas|jĂŠnangas]] || [[word:shĂŠnangas|shĂŠnangas]] || [[word:kĂŠnangas|kĂŠnangas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanangas|thathanangas]] || [[word:jajanangas|jajanangas]] || [[word:shashanangas|shashanangas]] || [[word:kakanangas|kakanangas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanangas|thanangas]] || [[word:janangas|janangas]] || [[word:shanangas|shanangas]] || [[word:kanangas|kanangas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanangas|thanangas]] || [[word:janangas|janangas]] || [[word:shanangas|shanangas]] || [[word:kanangas|kanangas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanangas|shanangas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanangas|goshanangas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanangas|gokishanangas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanangasnĂŒ|shanangasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanangasnknĂŒ|goshanangasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangasnĂŒ|gokishanangasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanangashĂ«|shanangashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanangasnkshĂ«|goshanangasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanangashĂ«|gokishanangashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangasro|shanangasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangasnkro|goshanangasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangasro|gokishanangasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangasmu|shanangasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangasnkmu|goshanangasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangasmu|gokishanangasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanangasher|shanangasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanangasnksher|goshanangasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanangasher|gokishanangasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanangasng|shanangasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanangasnkng|goshanangasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanangasng|gokishanangasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanangasya|shanangasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanangasnkya|goshanangasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanangasya|gokishanangasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanangasyam|shanangasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanangasnkyam|goshanangasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanangasyam|gokishanangasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangasnĂŒshĂ«|shanangasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanangasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanangasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangasnĂŒro|shanangasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangasnknĂŒro|goshanangasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangasnĂŒro|gokishanangasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangasnĂŒmu|shanangasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangasnknĂŒmu|goshanangasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangasnĂŒmu|gokishanangasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangashĂ«nĂŒ|shanangashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanangasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanangashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangashĂ«ro|shanangashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangasnkshĂ«ro|goshanangasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangashĂ«ro|gokishanangashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangashĂ«mu|shanangashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangasnkshĂ«mu|goshanangasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangashĂ«mu|gokishanangashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangasronĂŒ|shanangasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangasnkronĂŒ|goshanangasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangasronĂŒ|gokishanangasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangasroshĂ«|shanangasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangasnkroshĂ«|goshanangasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangasroshĂ«|gokishanangasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangasromu|shanangasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangasnkromu|goshanangasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangasromu|gokishanangasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangasmunĂŒ|shanangasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangasnkmunĂŒ|goshanangasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangasmunĂŒ|gokishanangasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangasmushĂ«|shanangasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangasnkmushĂ«|goshanangasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangasmushĂ«|gokishanangasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangasmuro|shanangasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangasnkmuro|goshanangasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangasmuro|gokishanangasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
